assertion_results.text: 'Add to Cart' and 'Quick View' actions are visible without hover on mobile — not hidden behind an opacity-0 hover overlay
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 177-185: Always-visible 'Add to Cart' button in the card body for all screen sizes. Desktop hover overlay at lines 166-170 uses 'hidden md:flex'. Quick View is desktop-only.

assertion_results.text: Product grid uses 1-2 columns on mobile instead of grid-cols-4
assertion_results.evidence: Line 133: grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Two columns on mobile.

assertion_results.text: The sidebar filter panel is converted to a modal, sheet, drawer, or collapsible section on mobile — not a permanent sidebar
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 49-107: Slide-in drawer from left with backdrop overlay. Triggered by 'Filters' button at lines 121-129. Close button in drawer header.

assertion_results.text: The wishlist heart button is always visible on mobile and meets 44px minimum tap target size
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 145-153: Always visible on mobile via md:opacity-0 md:group-hover:opacity-100. But tap target is p-2 + w-4 h-4 icon ≈ 32px. No min-w/min-h-[44px]. Below the 44px minimum.

assertion_results.text: Checkbox tap targets in the filter section are at least 44px (the w-3.5 h-3.5 originals are 14px)
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 69-71: Labels have py-2 (8px*2 = 16px padding). Checkboxes are w-4 h-4 (16px). Total row height ≈ 36px. No min-h-[44px]. Below the 44px minimum.
